data.title: Report: In the S&P 500, Disclosure of AI Risks Surges from 12% to 83%
data.description: In the period between 2023 and 2025, the proportion of S&P 500 firms reporting AI as a potential risk saw a significant increase from 12% to 83%. This noteworthy surge in AI-related risks has brought to light a deficiency in the readiness of corporate boards. Despite efforts to enhance their overall technology supervision, a substantial number of boards appear to be lacking in preparedness for addressing AI challenges.

data.title: Fannie Mae Announces Credit Score Model Updates to Advance Credit Score Modernization
data.description: In an effort to enhance competition and innovation in the credit scoring industry, Fannie Mae revealed plans to incorporate VantageScore® 4.0 into its Selling Guide. This update is set to rollout soon and aims to provide new credit score options to consumers. The move comes as part of the company's strategy to maintain an operational edge while diversifying its offerings. The decision was disclosed by Fannie Mae in Washington on April 22, 2026. The implementation of VantageScore® 4.0 signifies a shift towards incorporating more diverse credit assessment methodologies into the market. This move is expected to shake up the industry and open up new opportunities for both lenders and borrowers. Fannie Mae's decision underscores a commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry, embracing change, and fostering competition.

data.title: SLO County Airport and ForeFront Power Celebrate Earth Day with 100% Solar-Powered Airport
data.description: In San Luis Obispo, California, the San Luis Obispo County Airport (SBP) and ForeFront Power marked Earth Day with a Solar Ribbon Cutting & Sustainability Showcase. The event gathered elected officials, airport and County staff, project partners, and community members to highlight the Airport's new on-site solar parking canopy system generating 907-kilowatt DC. Attendees also learned how this project and the wider Sustainability & Decarbonization Plan are transforming airport operations.

data.title: Avangrid Foundation Supports Trust for Public Land
data.description: Avangrid, based in New Haven, Connecticut, has revealed their generous contribution of a $100,000 grant to the Trust for Public Land. This funding will aid in initiatives aimed at safeguarding parks and public lands while also working towards enhancing accessibility to nature for the community.

data.title: American Water Celebrates Earth Day by Promoting Water Conservation and Environmental Stewardship
data.description: To mark Earth Day on April 22, 2026, American Water (NYSE: AWK), the leading regulated water and wastewater utility firm in the United States, is urging customers and communities to play a role in safeguarding and preserving water resources. This initiative comes from the company's commitment to environmental conservation and sustainability.

data.title: Societe Generale: Availability or consultation of the information relating to the Combined General Meeting of Shareholders dated 27 May 2026
data.description: Information regarding the upcoming Combined General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for May 27, 2026, is now accessible for consultation. This press release highlights the availability of important details and documents related to the meeting. Shareholders can now access key information and materials to participate effectively in the meeting.

data.title: OpenAI has made available a new tool that removes personal data from text before using it with AI, including names, addresses, passwords, and account numbers.
data.description: OpenAI has recently launched a new compact model that can remove sensitive information such as names, addresses, passwords, and account numbers from text. This free tool can be utilized directly on your laptop, ensuring privacy protection before inputting data into AI chatbots.

data.title: 10x Science Raises $4.8M Seed to Build AI That Understands Proteins at the Molecular Level
data.description: In the San Francisco Bay Area, a company called 10x Science revealed today the completion of a $4.8 million seed funding round led by Initialized Capital. This funding aims to support the development of advanced AI technology for analyzing proteins at the molecular level, catering to various sectors within the life sciences industry. The round received overwhelming interest, surpassing the initial target amount set by the company.

data.title: Shares of Keel and Hive surge as they shift from Bitcoin mining to AI. Hive recently raised $115M while Keel sold a mining facility.
data.description: Hive recently secured a significant $115 million in funding, while Keel (previously known as Bitfarms) opted to sell a mining facility. This development comes as both Bitcoin miners show a growing interest in leveraging the advancements in artificial intelligence.

data.title: CPS Announces $514.07 Million Senior Subordinate Asset-Backed Securitization
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Las Vegas, Consumer Portfolio Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: CPSS) disclosed the completion of its 59th senior subordinate securitization since 2011 and the second term securitization in 2026. This marks the 42nd consecutive securitization by CPS to achieve a triple "A" rating from a minimum of two rating agencies for the senior class notes.

data.title: Boston Legacy FC Announces Multi-Year Partnership with mainelove
data.description: In Portland, Maine on April 23, 2026, Boston Legacy FC revealed a long-term collaboration with mainelove, a brand dedicated to sustainability and community initiatives. Through this partnership, mainelove becomes the Official Water Partner of Boston Legacy FC, supplying water for the team's training sessions and events.
